access_token.description: 7shifts API access token. Used only for Bearer auth (Authorization: Bearer <access_token>); never logged.

company_id.description: 7shifts company id; substituted into every company-scoped stream path (/v2/company/{{ config.company_id }}/...). Not used by the top-level companies stream.

base_url.description: 7shifts API base URL override for tests or proxies.

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound; only records modified at or after this date are read on a fresh sync (sent as modified_since, a date-only YYYY-MM-DD value).

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
